{{Infobox construct
| name = Redmoon's Remnant
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon's Remnant]] is a crimson, winged, beaked-wolf-like creature.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon's Remnant]] is a monstrous beaked [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon's Remnant]] is a monster.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
